hero.name: Anuket Kumar
hero.description: I specialize in building scalable, high-performance cross-platform applications. With over 3 years of experience, I transform complex business requirements into elegant, user-centric mobile and web solutions using Flutter and Dart.

about.description1: I am a passionate software engineer focused on crafting robust mobile and web applications. My expertise lies in architecting complex Flutter projects, implementing clean state management, and seamlessly integrating backend services to deliver flawless user experiences.
about.description2: Beyond just writing code, I actively collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive product innovation and establish engineering best practices. When I'm not building apps, you can find me exploring new tech, traveling, or enjoying a long walk in the park.

description: Spearheaded the development of a dynamic customer dashboard, enhancing user engagement by 30%.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement responsive design principles, ensuring seamless user experiences across various devices.
Introduced and implemented API integration and best practices in code reviews, resulting in a 20% improvement in code quality and faster development cycles.
Utilized advanced Dart concepts to create modular and reusable UI components, streamlining the development process and reducing time-to-market.
Actively participated in Agile ceremonies, fostering a collaborative and efficient development environment.
Analyzed user feedback to drive continuous improvement and user satisfaction.

jobs.company: Chakraborty and Lahkar Innovations Pvt. Ltd.
description: Played a critical role in implementing application designs and collaborating on cross-platform features to support product launches.

personalProjects.title: Lend Mate
personalProjects.description: A comprehensive loan management application built to help users manage debts and view schedules. Features complex local state management, dynamic PDF report generation, and extra payment tracking.
personalProjects.fullDescription: LendMate is a peer-to-peer loan tracking app built to help individuals manage personal loans with transparency between borrower and lender. The app supports loan creation, EMI scheduling, proof-based payment approvals, extra payments, reminders, and complete payment history so both parties can always see the latest loan status.
userHighlights: Create and manage personal loans with amount, interest rate, tenure, EMI date, and start date.
View separate dashboards for loans you borrowed and loans you lent.
Track EMI status, next due date, remaining balance, and completed payments in one place.
Mark EMIs as paid, upload payment proof, and wait for lender approval for transparent reconciliation.
Make extra payments and choose whether they reduce total interest or reduce loan tenure.
Store optional UPI IDs for borrower and lender to simplify repayment coordination.
developerHighlights: Structured around a layered Flutter architecture with models, repositories, BLoC/Cubit state management, and feature-based UI modules.
Uses Supabase for backend services, Supabase Auth for authentication, and Supabase Storage for payment proof uploads.
Implements EMI calculations, dynamic repayment updates, and extra payment recalculation logic for reducing tenure or interest impact.
Supports real-time sync for loan and payment status so both parties stay updated without manual refresh cycles.
Designed for extensibility with future support for PDF reports, group loans, AI reminders, UPI integration, and late-fee logic.
features: Loan creation with principal, annual interest, tenure, EMI date, start date, borrower selection, and optional UPI IDs.
Automatic EMI, total interest, and total repayment amount calculation.
Dual-role experience where one user can be a lender in one loan and a borrower in another.
Borrower payment workflow with screenshot proof upload and lender-side approval.
EMI tracking with pending, paid, and approved states plus next due date visibility.
Complete payment history with proof records and filtering by time period.
Reminder and notification flow for due EMIs, approvals, and extra payments.
Dashboard summary for borrowed amount, lent amount, upcoming payments, and overall repayment visibility.
